issues.title: chore: Verify zero TypeScript errors after UI import refactor
issues.body:
## Context
The root barrel `packages/ui/src/lib/index.ts` was removed and all ~82 import paths were migrated to per-subfolder paths.

## Task
Run `pnpm typecheck` from the monorepo root and confirm zero errors are reported across all packages.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` exits with code 0
- [ ] No `Module not found` or `Cannot find module` errors for `@workspace/ui/*` paths

## Notes
If errors remain, check that `packages/ui/src/lib/<subfolder>/index.ts` barrels exist for all exported components.
